name: Dragon Restday
desc:
Send 1 Dragon monster from your Deck to the GY, or if only your opponent control monsters, you can Set 1 Dragon monster to your field, instead. You cannot activate effects of monsters with the same name as monsters you Set by this card effect for the rest of this turn.
You can only activate 1 "Dragon Restday" per turn.
strings: Send 1 Dragon to GY or Set 1 Dragon
Send 1 Dragon monster from Deck to GY
